> How should I structure the palace package?
The palace package should be the only one importing sqlite3. Every other package goes through the Palace API.

> What about the embedder?
Define an interface so you can swap fake embedders in tests. The real embedder calls Python via subprocess.

> Should I use WAL mode?
Yes, WAL mode gives better concurrent read performance. Enable it with PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL on open.

> What about migrations?
Keep a migrate function that creates tables if they do not exist. Use IF NOT EXISTS for idempotency.
